title: Mojang Fix
description: A performance modpack for Fabric and Forge that helps improve both performance and fix Mojang bugs to achieve an optimal experience
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b90a33607f03acad3f6b78d6ef4f6e63f5797e.gif)a proposal that aims to take Minecraft Java optimization to the next level, for both Fabric and Forge. This modpack is designed for players with modest PCs, demanding servers, or content creators who need smooth performance without sacrificing gameplay. 

The core of the modpack revolves around the idea of “fix Mojang,” addressing internal engine bottlenecks in Minecraft. It includes mods such as Lithium, Sodium, FerriteCore, and other technical tweaks that improve chunk, entity, rendering, and memory performance. 
### ⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠⨠




> Mojang Fix does not add visual content or change the essence of vanilla gameplay, but it does ensure a more stable, faster, and efficient experience. Its approach allows both casual and technical players to adapt it to their needs without breaking compatibility with other mods. Ideal for those who want to play, record, or stream Minecraft without lag.
